521.description: Madisonville Community College (MCC) Adult Education (ACE²) provides free GED preparation, adult literacy, ESL, and workforce skills for Hopkins and Muhlenberg counties through Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE). Classes meet at the North Campus John H. Gray Building with instruction also available in county jails including Hopkins County and Muhlenberg County detention centers. First-time GED testing fees waived for eligible KYAE students.
521.description_es: Educación para Adultos de Madisonville Community College (MCC) ofrece preparación GED gratuita, alfabetización, ESL y habilidades laborales para los condados Hopkins y Muhlenberg a través de KYAE. Clases en el campus North en el edificio John H. Gray con instrucción en cárceles del condado. Tarifas GED exoneradas para estudiantes elegibles.
521.address: 2000 College Drive, John H. Gray Building, Rooms 210-213
521.notes: Enter via Glema Mahr Center concourse, third floor, then stairs/elevator to second floor near Assessment Center. Also serves Muhlenberg County. Promo code KYFREEGED1 for state-funded testing.
521.notes_es: Entrada por concourse del Glema Mahr Center. También sirve el Condado de Muhlenberg. Código KYFREEGED1 para pruebas financiadas.
521.services: Free GED preparation|Adult literacy and ESL|Corrections education in county jails|GED Ready testing|Workforce and college transition

522.description: Hazard Community and Technical College (HCTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation and adult education for Perry, Breathitt, Knott, Leslie, Letcher, Lee, Owsley, and Harlan counties. KYAE provider with in-person and virtual classes at the Devert Owens Technical Center and GED instruction inside Perry County Detention Center and regional county jails. First-time GED test fees waived for eligible students.
522.description_es: Educación para Adultos de HCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita para Perry, Breathitt, Knott, Leslie, Letcher, Lee, Owsley y Harlan. Proveedor KYAE con clases presenciales y virtuales e instrucción en la cárcel del Condado de Perry. Tarifas GED exoneradas para estudiantes elegibles.
522.address: 101 Vo-Tech Drive, Devert Owens Technical Center, Room 112
522.notes: Virtual classes Tuesday and Friday. Email hctc-adulted@kctcs.edu. Serves eight coalfield counties—call for nearest satellite location.
522.notes_es: Clases virtuales martes y viernes. Correo hctc-adulted@kctcs.edu. Sirve ocho condados—llame para ubicación satélite.
522.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; in-person classes Mon–Fri
522.services: Free GED preparation|Virtual and in-person instruction|County jail GED classes|Adult literacy|Workforce education

523.description: Elizabethtown Community and Technical College (ECTC) hosts the Heartland Adult Education Consortium lead center, providing free GED preparation, ESL, citizenship, and college-readiness for Hardin, LaRue, Breckinridge, Grayson, and Hart counties. KYAE provider with in-person and virtual instruction plus corrections education at Hardin County Detention Center. All enrollment, tutoring, and graduation services are free.
523.description_es: ECTC alberga el centro principal del Heartland Adult Education Consortium, ofreciendo preparación GED gratuita, ESL, ciudadanía y preparación universitaria para Hardin, LaRue, Breckinridge, Grayson y Hart. Proveedor KYAE con educación correccional en Hardin County Detention Center.
523.notes: Heartland consortium also has centers in Hardinsburg, Leitchfield, and Munfordville. GED testing at ECTC Assessment Center RPC Room 129. Radcliff satellite for northern Hardin County.
523.notes_es: Consorcio Heartland también tiene centros en Hardinsburg, Leitchfield y Munfordville. Pruebas GED en Assessment Center RPC Room 129.
523.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; virtual and evening options available
523.services: Free GED preparation|ESL and citizenship classes|Corrections education|College and career readiness|Virtual and in-person instruction

524.description: Maysville Community and Technical College (MCTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation, literacy, ESL, and college-readiness for Mason, Bath, Bracken, Fleming, Nicholas, Robertson, Harrison, and Lewis counties. KYAE provider with flexible in-person and online scheduling at the Maysville campus and instruction in county jail settings. Kentucky covers GED testing costs for eligible students.
524.description_es: Educación para Adultos de MCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita, alfabetización, ESL y preparación universitaria para Mason, Bath, Bracken, Fleming, Nicholas, Robertson, Harrison y Lewis. Proveedor KYAE con horarios flexibles e instrucción en cárceles del condado.
524.address: 1755 US Highway 68, Administration Building, Room A307
524.notes: Alternate line (606) 301-6049. Evening and weekend classes at multiple sites. Family literacy programming available.
524.notes_es: Línea alternativa (606) 301-6049. Clases nocturnas y de fin de semana. Programación de alfabetización familiar disponible.
524.services: Free GED preparation|ESL and family literacy|County jail adult education|College placement prep|Flexible online scheduling

525.description: Hopkinsville Community College (HCC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation, adult literacy, and college-transition support for Christian and Todd counties through KYAE. Main center at the Technology Building with satellite classes in Oak Grove and Elkton. Offers corrections education inside Christian County Detention Center plus GED Plus pathways pairing GED with certificate programs.
525.description_es: Educación para Adultos de HCC ofrece preparación GED gratuita, alfabetización y transición universitaria para Christian y Todd a través de KYAE. Centro principal en Technology Building con satélites en Oak Grove y Elkton. Educación correccional en Christian County Detention Center.
525.notes: Email hp-adulted@kctcs.edu. Oak Grove: 1705 Thompsonville Lane (Mon/Wed mornings). Todd County Library Elkton Tue/Thu mornings. Accelerated GED week-long courses available—pre-register required.
525.notes_es: Correo hp-adulted@kctcs.edu. Oak Grove: 1705 Thompsonville Lane. Biblioteca Todd County Elkton mar/jue. Cursos GED acelerados—preinscripción requerida.
525.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; Monday evenings 5:00–7:00 p.m.
525.services: Free GED preparation|Jail-based adult education|GED Plus certificate pathways|ESL and college remediation|Satellite classes in Oak Grove and Elkton

526.description: Prodigal Ministries is a faith-based residential aftercare program founded in 1994, operating four transitional homes in Jefferson and Oldham counties. The Brown House in Buckner provides structured sober living for up to 10 men leaving incarceration, with case management, job-readiness coaching, weekly accountability meetings, and PCS mental health and addiction counseling. Accepts residents with felony records; Christ-centered but open to all seeking recovery.
526.description_es: Prodigal Ministries es un programa residencial de aftercare de fe fundado en 1994 con cuatro hogares transitorios en Jefferson y Oldham. La Brown House en Buckner ofrece vivienda sobria estructurada para hasta 10 hombres saliendo de la cárcel, con gestión de casos, preparación laboral y consejería de PCS. Acepta residentes con antecedentes penales.
526.notes: Office mailing: PO Box 1484, Crestwood KY 40014. Case screener Roberta Shepherd: (502) 649-6459. Also operates Prodigal House East/West (Louisville) and McCauley House (women, Crestwood).
526.notes_es: Correo: PO Box 1484, Crestwood KY 40014. Evaluadora Roberta Shepherd: (502) 649-6459. También opera casas en Louisville y Crestwood.
526.hours: Office Mon–Fri business hours; residential program 24/7
526.services: Structured sober living for men|Case management and job readiness|PCS mental health and addiction counseling|Spiritual mentorship|Weekly house accountability meetings

527.description: Seven Counties Services Bullitt County office provides outpatient mental health, addiction, and psychiatric services for Bullitt County residents. Regional CMHC serving Bullitt, Henry, Jefferson, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, and Trimble counties with explicit programming for justice-involved individuals on probation, parole, or recently released. 24/7 crisis line available.
527.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Bullitt de Seven Counties Services proporciona salud mental ambulatoria, adicción y servicios psiquiátricos. CMHC regional que atiende a personas involucradas con la justicia en libertad condicional o recién liberadas. Línea de crisis 24/7.
527.notes: Adult office (502) 955-6447; Child & Family (502) 955-7036. 24/7 Crisis: (502) 589-4313. Affiliated with Centerstone; operates under Seven Counties name in this region.
527.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Substance use counseling|Psychiatric evaluation and medication|Crisis intervention 24/7|Justice-involved reentry support

528.description: Seven Counties Services Oldham County office in La Grange provides outpatient mental health and substance use treatment for Henry, Oldham, and Trimble County residents. Regional CMHC serving justice-involved individuals on probation, parole, or reintegrating from incarceration with individual therapy, group counseling, psychiatric services, and peer support.
528.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Oldham de Seven Counties Services en La Grange ofrece salud mental ambulatoria y tratamiento de sustancias para Henry, Oldham y Trimble. CMHC que atiende a personas en libertad condicional o reintegrándose desde la cárcel.
528.notes: Alternate office line (502) 222-7486. 24/7 Crisis: (502) 589-4313. Serves Henry, Oldham, and Trimble counties from this location.
528.notes_es: Línea alternativa (502) 222-7486. Crisis 24/7: (502) 589-4313. Sirve Henry, Oldham y Trimble.
528.services: Individual and group therapy|Substance use counseling|Psychiatric services|Peer support|Crisis intervention referrals

529.description: Seven Counties Services Spencer County office in Taylorsville provides outpatient mental health and substance use counseling for Spencer County residents. Part of the Louisville-area CMHC serving justice-involved individuals reintegrating from incarceration, on probation, or parole with therapy, psychiatric evaluation, medication management, and peer support.
529.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Spencer de Seven Counties Services en Taylorsville ofrece salud mental ambulatoria y consejería sobre sustancias. CMHC del área de Louisville que atiende a personas reintegrándose desde la cárcel o en libertad condicional.
529.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (502) 589-4313. Serves Spencer County; regional CMHC covers Bullitt, Henry, Jefferson, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, and Trimble.
529.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (502) 589-4313. Sirve Spencer County; CMHC regional cubre siete condados.
529.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Substance use counseling|Psychiatric evaluation|Medication management|Peer support referrals

530.description: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC) Gallatin County Neighborhood Center in Warsaw provides LIHEAP utility assistance, weatherization, emergency aid, food security programs, and kynect benefits enrollment for Gallatin, Carroll, Grant, and Owen counties. Serves low-income individuals regardless of criminal history; reentry clients encouraged to apply for needs-based assistance.
530.description_es: El Centro Vecinal del Condado de Gallatin de NKCAC en Warsaw ofrece LIHEAP, climatización, ayuda de emergencia, seguridad alimentaria e inscripción kynect para Gallatin, Carroll, Grant y Owen. Sirve a personas de bajos ingresos sin importar el historial criminal.
530.notes: Neighborhood Center hours Mon–Fri 12:00–4:00 p.m.; some services Mon–Thu 7:30 a.m.–5:00 p.m. per city listing. Virtual appointments available 11 a.m.–12 p.m. Mon–Fri. NKCAC headquarters: 717 Madison Ave, Covington.
530.notes_es: Horario del centro vecinal lun–vie 12:00–16:00. Citas virtuales 11:00–12:00 lun–vie. Sede: 717 Madison Ave, Covington.
530.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Weatherization|Emergency financial aid|Food security programs|kynect Medicaid and SNAP enrollment

531.description: Boyle County Detention Center (BCDC) hosts a Kentucky DOC-contracted Substance Abuse Program (SAP) for state-sentenced male inmates—a six-month intensive therapeutic community with 35 hours weekly of evidence-based curriculum, group therapy, and recovery activities. Operated by Shepherd's House under state contract. BCDC also offers MRT, GED, Jail to Job reentry, and PORTAL programs. Post-release IOP available through Shepherd's House Danville.
531.description_es: El Centro de Detención del Condado de Boyle alberga un Programa de Abuso de Sustancias (SAP) contratado por DOC de Kentucky para reclusos estatales varones—comunidad terapéutica intensiva de seis meses. Operado por Shepherd's House. También ofrece MRT, GED, Jail to Job y PORTAL.
531.notes: SAP for state inmates via Shepherd's House (shepherdshouseinc.com/programs/sap-program). Post-release IOP: Shepherd's House Danville South Third St. Entry requires DOC classification—not open to public walk-in.
531.notes_es: SAP para reclusos estatales vía Shepherd's House. IOP post-liberación en Danville. Requiere clasificación DOC—no abierto al público.
531.hours: SAP programming Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. for enrolled state inmates
531.services: In-custody SAP therapeutic community (state inmates)|MRT and anger management|GED and Jail to Job reentry|PORTAL New Direction|Post-release IOP linkage via Shepherd's House

532.description: Kentucky Department of Corrections Probation & Parole District 6 office in Danville supervises individuals on felony probation, parole, or conditional discharge in Boyle, Green, LaRue, Marion, Mercer, Nelson, Taylor, and Washington counties. Provides reporting, case management, and referrals to community reentry resources. Call to confirm reporting schedule and walk-in availability.
532.description_es: La oficina del Distrito 6 de Libertad Condicional y Supervisada en Danville supervisa personas en libertad condicional, supervisada o descarga condicional por delitos graves en Boyle, Green, LaRue, Marion, Mercer, Nelson, Taylor y Washington. Llame para confirmar horario de reporte.
532.notes: Alternate line (859) 239-7693. Fax (859) 239-7039. District Supervisor Charece Kelly. Serves 8 counties from Danville—not Boyle County only.
532.notes_es: Línea alternativa (859) 239-7693. Supervisora Charece Kelly. Sirve 8 condados desde Danville.
532.services: Felony probation and parole supervision|Conditional discharge reporting|Case management|Community reentry referrals|Walk-in reporting (call to confirm)

533.description: Bluegrass Community Action Partnership (BGCAP) Boyle County office in Danville provides LIHEAP utility assistance, weatherization, emergency financial aid, kynect benefits enrollment, and family support for low-income residents of Boyle and Garrard counties. Serves individuals regardless of criminal history; official kynector for Medicaid, SNAP, and health plan applications.
533.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Boyle de BGCAP en Danville ofrece LIHEAP, climatización, ayuda financiera de emergencia, inscripción kynect y apoyo familiar para Boyle y Garrard. Sirve sin importar el historial criminal; kynector oficial para Medicaid y SNAP.
533.notes: Kynector Julie Turpin: (502) 232-4456. Also serves Garrard County from Danville office. LIHEAP seasonal—apply early when program opens.
533.notes_es: Kynector Julie Turpin: (502) 232-4456. También sirve Garrard. LIHEAP estacional—aplique temprano.
533.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Weatherization|Emergency financial aid|kynect Medicaid and SNAP enrollment|Family self-sufficiency programs

534.description: Bluegrass Community Action Partnership (BGCAP) Lincoln County office in Stanford provides LIHEAP utility assistance, weatherization, emergency financial aid, food referrals, and kynect benefits enrollment for low-income Lincoln County residents. Serves clients regardless of criminal history; walk-ins welcome—call ahead to confirm hours and seasonal program availability.
534.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Lincoln de BGCAP en Stanford ofrece LIHEAP, climatización, ayuda financiera de emergencia, referencias de alimentos e inscripción kynect. Sirve sin importar el historial criminal; se aceptan visitas sin cita.
534.notes: Office hours 7:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m. per BGCAP listing. Kynector Michelle Ballew: (502) 682-0944. Part of nine-county BGCAP service area.
534.notes_es: Horario 7:30–16:00. Kynector Michelle Ballew: (502) 682-0944. Parte del área de servicio de nueve condados de BGCAP.
534.services: LIHEAP utility assistance|Weatherization|Emergency financial aid|Food referrals|kynect benefits enrollment

535.description: Cliffview Recovery Center is a Mountain Comprehensive Care Center (MCCC) program offering residential and intensive outpatient substance use treatment on 42 acres at Herrington Lake near Lancaster. Serves adults with evidence-based practices including CBT, DBT, 12-step recovery, and Recovery Dynamics. Accepts court, jail, and community supervision referrals with discharge planning for reentry.
535.description_es: Cliffview Recovery Center es un programa de MCCC que ofrece tratamiento residencial y ambulatorio intensivo de sustancias en 42 acres cerca de Lancaster. Atiende adultos con TCC, TDC, recuperación de 12 pasos y Recovery Dynamics. Acepta referencias de tribunales, cárceles y supervisión comunitaria.
535.notes: Residential, IOP (6–8 weeks), and up to one year outpatient aftercare. Garrard County location on Herrington Lake peninsula. MCCC crisis: (800) 262-7491.
535.notes_es: Residencial, IOP (6–8 semanas) y hasta un año de aftercare ambulatorio. Ubicación en península del lago Herrington. Crisis MCCC: (800) 262-7491.
535.services: Residential substance use treatment|Intensive outpatient program|Outpatient aftercare up to one year|Life skills and recreational therapy|Court and jail referral intake

536.description: WestCare Kentucky's Estill County Community Involvement Center (CIC) in Irvine provides outpatient substance use treatment including individual and group counseling, DUI assessments, anger management, relapse prevention, and vocational assistance. Serves justice-involved individuals under community supervision or recently released with Medicaid, private insurance, and sliding-scale self-pay options.
536.description_es: El Centro de Participación Comunitaria (CIC) de WestCare Kentucky en Irvine ofrece tratamiento ambulatorio de sustancias con consejería individual y grupal, evaluaciones DUI, manejo de ira y prevención de recaídas. Atiende a personas involucradas con la justicia con Medicaid, seguro privado y tarifa escalonada.
536.notes: Community-based CIC model with wraparound supports. Also offers transitional housing referrals. Part of WestCare Kentucky network serving Eastern Kentucky.
536.notes_es: Modelo CIC comunitario con apoyos integrales. También ofrece referencias de vivienda transitoria. Parte de la red WestCare Kentucky.
536.services: Outpatient substance use counseling|DUI assessments and education|Anger management|Relapse prevention|Vocational assistance and housing linkage

537.description: New Vista Estill County Outpatient Clinic in Irvine provides mental health, substance use, primary care, and crisis services for Estill County residents. Regional CMHC (Region 15) serving 17 Bluegrass counties with Open Access intake, walk-in assessments Tue/Thu, and 24/7 helpline. Serves justice-involved individuals on probation or parole.
537.description_es: La Clínica Ambulatoria del Condado de Estill de New Vista en Irvine ofrece salud mental, uso de sustancias, atención primaria y crisis. CMHC regional (Región 15) con Open Access, evaluaciones sin cita mar/jue y línea de ayuda 24/7. Atiende personas en libertad condicional.
537.notes: 24-Hour Helpline: (800) 928-8000. Walk-in intakes Tue 9–11 a.m. and Thu 1–3 p.m. Fax (606) 723-3288. Evening/weekend appointments by request.
537.notes_es: Línea 24 horas: (800) 928-8000. Intakes sin cita mar 9–11 y jue 13–15. Citas nocturnas/fin de semana bajo solicitud.
537.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. (closed lunch 12–1 p.m.); crisis helpline 24/7
537.services: Outpatient mental health therapy|Substance use and IOP programs|Psychiatric care and medication management|Primary care integration|24/7 crisis helpline and mobile crisis

538.description: NorthKey Community Care Carroll County office in Carrollton provides outpatient mental health, substance use, psychiatric, and IDD services for Carroll County residents. Northern Kentucky CMHC with Open Access at all offices and 24/7 crisis line. Serves justice-involved individuals on probation or parole with therapy, case management, peer support, and housing/vocational specialists.
538.description_es: La oficina del Condado de Carroll de NorthKey Community Care en Carrollton ofrece salud mental ambulatoria, uso de sustancias, psiquiatría y servicios IDD. CMHC del norte de Kentucky con Open Access y línea de crisis 24/7. Atiende personas en libertad condicional con terapia y apoyo entre pares.
538.notes: 24/7 Crisis/Access: (859) 331-3292. First Tuesday monthly extended hours until 7 p.m. Adult Day Training for IDD on-site. Telehealth available.
538.notes_es: Crisis/Acceso 24/7: (859) 331-3292. Primer martes del mes hasta las 19:00. Capacitación diurna para IDD. Telemedicina disponible.
538.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 a.m.–5:00 p.m.; first Tuesday until 7:00 p.m.; crisis line 24/7
538.services: Outpatient mental health and SUD therapy|Psychiatric services|Open Access intake|24/7 crisis line|Peer support and housing/vocational specialists
